programme.title: MSG Shorts
programme.desc: Featuring interviews and images of American sports figures.

programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: From March 14, 2026.

programme.title: Best of Rangers
programme.desc: From March 27, 2026.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: This month in Minneapolis, we talk with a collector who has over 3000 in-person autograph cards in his collection. We also visit the only baseball glove repair shop in the U.S. and highlight a card show designed just for kids with special needs.

programme.title: FIBA World Basketball
programme.desc: Weekly wrap-up of basketball action from around the world including features on the world's top players, leagues and tournaments.

programme.title: MSG Shorts
programme.desc: Featuring interviews and images of American sports figures.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: MSG Shorts
programme.desc: Featuring interviews and images of American sports figures.

programme.title: Kop 10
programme.desc: Relive ten of Liverpool's most memorable away matches in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Marseille.

programme.title: Bobby Doc
programme.desc: From the humble origins of his hometown in Brazil to the height of success with the Reds, this 'LFC Originals¿ documentary maps the life of samba star Roberto Firmino.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: From Bootle-boy to Liverpool legend, few players encapsulated what it meant to represent Liverpool FC like 'Carra.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Fernando Torres scored for the Reds.

programme.title: The Premier League Fixtures Show
programme.desc: Join LFCTV for reaction as the Premier League fixtures for the 2026/27 season are announced.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans back in 2022.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Qarabag.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In this LFC Originals exclusive, we visit the childhood home of Alisson Becker and discover the story of his first steps towards becoming one of the world¿s finest goalkeepers.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Qarabag.

programme.title: The Premier League Fixtures Show
programme.desc: Join LFCTV for reaction as the Premier League fixtures for the 2026/27 season are announced.

programme.title: A Day With: Hugo Ekitike
programme.desc: Liverpool¿s star forward is joined by Rubi Deschamps to delve into the Frenchman¿s life off the pitch and his start to life in Merseyside.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: The best of the action as Liverpool take on Qarabag.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: A brand-new, exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Qarabag.

programme.title: The Premier League Fixtures Show
programme.desc: Join LFCTV for reaction as the Premier League fixtures for the 2026/27 season are announced.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Phil Thompson joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 1974 FA Cup win win over Newcastle United.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A look back at some of Philippe Coutinho's greatest goals.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U21 Season so Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U21s 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U18 Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U18's 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Macca & Macca
programme.desc: Steve McManaman discusses his match-winning performance in the 1995 League Cup Final with his opponent that day, Jason McAteer.

programme.title: Gerrard: My Liverpool
programme.desc: Liverpool legend Steven Gerrard relives the highs and lows of his illustrious Anfield career, featuring exclusive interviews with those who know him best.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.desc: A look at the career of Valentino Rossi.

programme.title: Sporting Countdowns

programme.title: DTM Motorsport Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the second race at Lausitzring.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Three contestants compete against one another and answer questions to earn spins on the Big Board. Then, they use their spins to win cash and prizes while trying to avoid the WHAMMY, who could take all of their winnings and leave them with nothing.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: The McFadden family competes with the Burns family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties Tia and Berni battle life partners Cotton and Lewis.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Paul, Charli, Monica, and Wesley.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Wiz Khalifa, Ty Dolla $ign, Bobby Moynihan and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Real-life Las Vegas hero Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million; Emmitt Smith shows up to celebrate Justin's feat of heroism; Justin plays like a champ fighting for the big six-figure money.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Cheerleader Kristen Tex Iniguez hopes to cheer her way to a million dollars; bowling champion Kyera Chandler hopes to strike it rich and start her own business.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Kirsten, Kennede, Matt and Jay.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Bros Cameron and Jonathan take on mom/daughter duo Brittany and Gloria.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Mark "The Beast" Labbett returns as the chaser with three new hopefuls ready to face off against him in a race against the clock.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Dustin Johnson at Oakmont Country Club.

programme.title: Breaking
programme.desc: The course is the only competitor golfers play every time and beating par is a goal for many single-digit handicappers. Devan Bonebrake helps them do just that with drills, strategies and by following Tiger's six metrics to breaking par.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: Don Saladino, Paige Mackenzie and Devan Bonebrake teach exercises that will build a better backswing, improve transition and help stick the finish. Learn how to use a medicine ball to stop the slice and exercise bands to maximize your clubhead speed.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: Exercises that will help make solid contact with irons and increase distance with the driver. This exercise program will build lower body stability, improve upper body mobility and strengthen the core.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal demonstrate how to improve on tempo and rhythm. Martin discusses the difference between the two and shares tips used by Hall of Famers such as Tom Watson, Ernie Els, Vijay Singh, and Nick Faldo.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach a variety of shots from the sand, including how to hit green-side bunker shots. Martin also shares fairway bunker tips he learned from Rory McIlroy, and Tom Watson shares his advice for dealing with plugged lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are back on the range teaching how to get off to a solid start this golf season; ball striking tips used by greats; Hall reveals how two empty sleeves of golf balls can improve ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach a variety of shots from the sand, including how to hit green-side bunker shots. Martin also shares fairway bunker tips he learned from Rory McIlroy, and Tom Watson shares his advice for dealing with plugged lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in The Masters; Martin shares a driving tip he learned playing golf with Dustin Johnson and a distance drill used by Jack Nicklaus; a top college player gives a guest lesson.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall explains how to become a better putter ASAP; those four letters standing for aim, stability, arc, and pace. Martin shares drills for each letter from putting gurus including Dave Stockton, Phil Kenyon, and the late Frank Thomas.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: What to learn from past and current Ryder Cup players and captains. Learn drills to crush the driver like European captain Padraig Harrington and split the fairway like United States captain Steve Stricker.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: HotelPlannerTour Series H/L
programme.desc: Highlights of the 2026 Swiss Challenge, where athletes compete to emerge victorious.

programme.title: HotelPlannerTour Series H/L
programme.desc: Highlights of the 2026 Interwetten Open, where athletes compete to emerge victorious.

programme.title: Live: The Big Swing With Jimmy Roberts
programme.desc: Conversations with people making news in the business of golf.

programme.title: Live: 5 Clubs With Gary Williams
programme.desc: Viewpoints of people in the game with people who love the game; we discuss what is of interest to them in the vast and deep reservoir of stories within the game of golf.

programme.title: The Big Swing With Jimmy Roberts
programme.desc: Conversations with people making news in the business of golf.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Coors Field in Denver.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.desc: From Coors Field in Denver.

programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.title: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: NESN Rundown
programme.desc: The best segments from today's NESN podcasts.

programme.title: The Hockey Hub
programme.desc: Hockey talk from NESN announcers that begins with the Bruins and expands to cover the greater New England hockey scene.

programme.title: NESN Rundown
programme.desc: The best segments from today's NESN podcasts.

programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Live: Bruins Press Conference
programme.desc: Boston Bruins have announced they will retire the No. 37 of captain and forward Patrice Bergeron during the upcoming 2026-27 season.

programme.title: 310 to Left
programme.desc: Tom Caron and Alex Spier discuss Red Sox topics, including prospects, front office matters and future team expectations.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Coors Field in Denver.

programme.title: Live: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: America's Mad Fisherman heads to the Green Mountain State of Vermont and fishes with long-time friend Joel St. Germain. Although fishing is good, the weather becomes the real issue.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads to Charleston, S.C. He takes a haunted horse tour and meets up with long-time friend Chris Floyd to fish for sea trout and red fish; Charlie takes a stroll through historical downtown Charleston; Charlie tries the local sushi.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance features top-ranked fighters, up-and-coming fighters, intense action and footage from some of the biggest names in combat sports and exclusive content spanning MMA, boxing, kickboxing, bare knuckle boxing, Muay Thai and more.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Wayne Gretzky scores goal number 802 as the Canucks take on the Kings in 1994.

programme.title: A Day That Changed the Game
programme.desc: Eric Lindros trade.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Breaking Down Barriers: Changing Hockey Culture
programme.desc: In the summer of 2021 Nashville Predators prospect Luke Prokop becomes the first openly gay player under an NHL contract; he becomes a role model within the sport and aims to make hockey a more inclusive space for everyone.

programme.title: Breaking Down Barriers
programme.desc: Viewers meet some of the brave trailblazers working to make hockey more inclusive: Seattle Kraken Head Athletic trainer Justin Rogers, AHL official Dre Barone and NHL agent Bayne Bettinger.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: The Whalers
programme.desc: Almost three decades after leaving Connecticut, the Hartford Whalers remain a fixture in the sports world. This is the story of how the team came to be, why they moved and what makes them a throwback phenomenon.

programme.title: 2026 Stanley Cup Final
programme.desc: The Vegas Golden Knights and Carolina Hurricanes meet in Game 6 of the Stanley Cup Final. The visiting Hurricanes protect a 4-2 series edge behind goalie Brandon Bussi's 23 saves from Game 5, while Vegas counters with sharp offense on home ice.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Wiz Khalifa, Ty Dolla $ign, Bobby Moynihan and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Real-life Las Vegas hero Justin Uhart storms the stage ready to risk it all for his chance at $1 million; Emmitt Smith shows up to celebrate Justin's feat of heroism; Justin plays like a champ fighting for the big six-figure money.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Cheerleader Kristen Tex Iniguez hopes to cheer her way to a million dollars; bowling champion Kyera Chandler hopes to strike it rich and start her own business.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Kirsten, Kennede, Matt and Jay.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Bros Cameron and Jonathan take on mom/daughter duo Brittany and Gloria.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Mark "The Beast" Labbett returns as the chaser with three new hopefuls ready to face off against him in a race against the clock.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: Malik Washington threw for two touchdowns and ran in another score to help the Terrapins beat the Badgers, 27-10. From Sept. 20, 2025.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Hear from head coach Sasho Cirovski, Sebastian Elney, Chase Gasper and more as they re-live Elney's game-winning goals that secured Maryland wins over rival UCLA in 2015 and 2017.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Ludwig Field in College Park, Md.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Women's College Volleyball
programme.desc: From Xfinity Center in College Park, Md.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: College Field Hockey
programme.desc: From Dr. Christine H.B. Grant Field in Iowa City, Iowa.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Hear from head coach Sasho Cirovski, Sebastian Elney, Chase Gasper and more as they re-live Elney's game-winning goals that secured Maryland wins over rival UCLA in 2015 and 2017.

programme.title: B1G Basketball in 60
programme.desc: Keaton Wagner led with 23 points and David Markovic scored 22 points in the 13th-ranked Fighting Illini's 88-80 victory over the Buckeyes. From Dec. 9, 2025.

programme.title: Michigan Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Yaxel Lendeborg had 26 points and 12 rebounds to lead the 3rd-ranked Wolverines to an 83-71 victory over the 7th-ranked Spartans. From Jan. 30, 2026.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Yaxel Lendeborg gives his mom a gift she will never forget. Learn about Morez Johnson Jr.'s connection with former Michigan football great, Tai Streets. Plus, go behind the scenes of the Wolverines' victory over the Fighting Illini in Champaign.

programme.title: Michigan Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Morez Johnson Jr. scored 17 points in the 3rd-ranked Wolverines' 75-72 victory over the 5th-ranked Cornhuskers. From Jan. 27, 2026.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Big Ten all-time assist leader Braden Smith's journey to Purdue. Michigan's Yaxel Lendeborg gives his mom a gift she will never forget. Spend time on the water with Oregon's Nate Bittle.

programme.title: B1G Basketball in 60
programme.desc: Keaton Wagler scored 22 points to help lead the 20th-ranked Fighting Illini to victory over the Mizzou Tigers in St. Louis. From Dec. 22, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Basketball in 60
programme.desc: Bennett Stirtz led with 22 points and Alvaro Folgueiras had 20 points to help lead the Hawkeyes to victory over the Buckeyes. From Feb. 25, 2026.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Hear from Illinois' Keaton Wagler. The Ivisic Brothers go from opponents to teammates. Kylan Boswell plays in front of his hometown Illini fans for the final time.

programme.title: Illinois Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Keaton Wagler scored a career-high 46 points to help lead the 11th-ranked Fighting Illini to an 88-82 victory over the 4th-ranked Boilermakers. From Jan. 24, 2026.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Hannes Steinbach on the legacy of German-born players at Washington. Hear from Illinois' Keaton Wagler. Learn about Morez Johnson Jr.'s connection with former Michigan football great, Tai Streets. Plus, go behind the scenes as the Wolverines travel to Champaign to face the Fighting Illini.

programme.title: Michigan Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Morez Johnson Jr. had 19 points and 11 rebounds in the 3rd-ranked Wolverines' 84-70 victory over the 10th-ranked Fighting Illini to clinch the Big Ten regular-season title. From Feb. 27, 2026.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: Learn how Bennett Stirtz has earned the nickname Iron Man at Iowa. Kayden Mingo shares what he's learned during his time at Penn State. Tariq Francis on keeping up production at Rutgers.

programme.title: B1G Basketball in 60
programme.desc: Bennett Stirtz scored 20 points to help the Hawkeyes get the win as they hold off the Trojans' late-game comeback in an exciting 73-72 finish. From Jan. 28, 2026.

programme.title: Iowa Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Bennett Stirtz scored 25 points to lead the Hawkeyes to a 57-52 upset victory over the 9th-ranked Cornhuskers. From Feb. 17, 2026.

programme.title: Illinois Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Keaton Wagner scored 28 points in the 9th-ranked Fighting Illini's 78-69 victory over the 5th-ranked Cornhuskers. From Feb. 1, 2026.

programme.title: Illinois Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Keaton Wagler scored a career-high 46 points to help lead the 11th-ranked Fighting Illini to an 88-82 victory over the 4th-ranked Boilermakers. From Jan. 24, 2026.

programme.title: Purdue Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Oscar Cluff scored 21 points and Trey Kaufman-Renn had 20 to help the 7th-seeded Boilermakers beat the top-seeded Wolverines, 80-72, to earn the program's third Big Ten Tournament title. From March 15, 2026.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Orange (3-8, 1-6 ACC) and Eagles (1-10, 0-7) close out the 2025 campaign with this tilt. Boston College has won two straight meetings, and four of its last five visits to Syracuse. The programs have lost a combined 17 consecutive outings.
